rationale: Empirical lens, all gates green and the decisive check passes with running proof. go build ./... (0), go vet ./... (0), gofmt -l excl docs_archive empty, go test -count=1 ./internal/validate/... PASS (31s); TestRootOperatorDocsNotUnowned RUNS+PASSES (verbose-confirmed). DECISIVE: a temp _test.go (now deleted, worktree clean) ran the REAL ValidateDivergence over the actual range 2cfed766..ade250ef = 0 issues / 0 unowned, AND independently enumerated ALL 458 base..head paths via isProcessArtifact || attributeDomain-at-head{workflow,core,execution,context-system}: 453 process-artifact + 5 owned + 0 neither. The 5 non-artifact paths (internal/instruct/templates/spec.md; internal/validate/{divergence.go,docsync.go,divergence_test.go,layout_classifier_test.go}) all match workflow's internal/instruct/** and internal/validate/** globs; workflow is a declared Impacted Domain → owned, never unowned. So Bead 5 complete clears adr-divergence-unowned. The fix is PRECISE: rootOperatorDocs is an exact-name set (tighter than the old HasPrefix), so README.md+BENCH-MOVED.md classify as docs while control internal/foo.go stays non-doc source. R1/R2 move + fixes undisturbed; no new issue. (BRIEF said 456 paths; I enumerated 458 — a superset — still zero unowned.)

findings.issue: Re-traced ALL 458 base..head (2cfed766..ade250ef) paths via the real predicates: isProcessArtifact || attributeDomain at head over the spec's Impacted Domains {workflow,core,execution,context-system}. Result: 453 process-artifact, 5 owned (all workflow: internal/instruct/templates/spec.md via internal/instruct/**, and internal/validate/{divergence.go,docsync.go,divergence_test.go,layout_classifier_test.go} via internal/validate/**), 0 neither. ZERO unowned. Real ValidateDivergence over the same range corroborated: 0 issues / 0 unowned findings. Bead 5 complete will pass adr-divergence-unowned.

isDocFile now matches rootOperatorDocs (exact-name set {CLAUDE.md,AGENTS.md,README.md,BENCH-MOVED.md}), replacing the old strings.HasPrefix(path,"CLAUDE.md")/"AGENTS.md" — exact match is STRICTER, not broader. Empirically: isDocFile/isProcessArtifact true for README.md+BENCH-MOVED.md; control internal/foo.go classifies as NEITHER doc NOR process-artifact AND remains isSourceFile==true. No over-match lets real top-level source escape the gate. Consistent with internal/layout DefaultRootDocs + internal/doctor movedTreeRootDocs.

TestRootOperatorDocsNotUnowned (unit + end-to-end ValidateDivergence) RUNS and PASSES: README.md+BENCH-MOVED.md skipped before attribution, control internal/foo.go the only unowned finding. Whole internal/validate suite PASS (-count=1, ~31s) before AND after my temp test was added/removed.

go build ./... exit 0; go vet ./... exit 0; gofmt -l . (excluding docs_archive/) empty. Round-3 diff is exactly the 4 declared files (docsync.go, divergence.go, divergence_test.go, .mindspec/domains/workflow/architecture.md); r1 move + r2 fixes undisturbed. harness intentionally not run (out-of-scope per BRIEF).
